message:
fix: emit structured TOON output for empty markdown imports

The early-return path in execute_import only emitted JSON for empty
issue lists, silently dropping output in TOON mode. Add a ctx.toon()
call so callers using BR_OUTPUT_FORMAT=toon get a proper empty array.
Includes an e2e test that verifies the empty TOON payload decodes
correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
